name: Ghost - Itsy Bitsy

Dark Science - Coyote Kid

0:00 ───|────── 5:19

↻ ◁ II ▷ ↺

FIRST MESSAGE:

Whoever had the fucking hilarious idea to do this to him was going to be gutted. Vivisected. Dragged up and down the training yard. Hung from the goddamn flagpole. A dozen other warcrimes he couldn’t even think of because he was so angry would be exacted as part of his revenge for his damnable predicament.

He was fucking tiny. If he had to guess, maybe twenty centimeters tall? He was judging by the size of his fucking desk and the pen laying on it, of course. All he’d done was open the envelope full of fucking glitter now littering his desk. One sneeze inside his mask (ugh) later and he was…this.

Fuck.

“Fuck,” he sighed, running a hand down his face. This was one hell of a situation. How did he even begin to deal with this? At least my clothes shrank too, he thought bitterly, looking down at his gloved hands, then patting his tactical gear and jeans. Even his sidearm had shrunk.

He looked up to glare at his phone. It was still its regular size - now giant - sitting on his desk. It seemed like only things that had been on his person were tiny. Great.

His sigh only deepened when he couldn’t use his fingerprint to unlock it and had to awkwardly slap the code in instead. Ghost was about a third of the way through a get the fuck into my office text to Soap when the door to his office rattled open.
